description: You are a production assistant preparing an animation scene for handoff to an external partner studio. Export the scene 'dwanko_run.tnz' from /home/ga/OpenToonz/samples/ to /home/ga/OpenToonz/output/handoff_package/. The exported package must be self-contained, ensuring all drawing asset files (PLI/TLV levels) are copied to the destination folder and the new scene file references these local copies rather than the original source files.
